mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.password, u.pay_password, case when u.pay_password is null or u.pay_password = '' then 0 else 1 end as pay_password_set, u.security_question_set, u.total_invest_amount, u.total_recharge_amount, u.growth_value, u.team_leader_level, u.default_currency, u.real_name_status, u.invite_code, u.level_detail, u.user_level, u.level, u.sex, u.birthday, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.pwd_update_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.update_by, u.update_time, u.remark, d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.status as dept_status, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.status as role_status, (select p.user_name from sys_user p where p.user_id = substring_index(u.level_detail, ',', -1) and p.user_id != 0) as parent_user_name from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id
mapper.select:
select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.real_name_status, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where u.del_flag = '0' and (r.role_id != #{roleId} or r.role_id IS NULL) and u.user_id not in (select u.user_id from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id and ur.role_id = #{roleId})
AND u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
${params.dataScope}

select user_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, password, status, del_flag, avatar, phonenumber, email, invite_code, level_detail, user_level, level, pay_password, security_question_set, total_invest_amount, total_recharge_amount, team_leader_level, default_currency, real_name_status, login_ip, login_date, pwd_update_date, create_time, update_time from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select user_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, avatar, phonenumber, email, sex, birthday, invite_code, level_detail, user_level, level, pay_password, security_question_set, growth_value, default_currency, real_name_status, status, del_flag, login_ip, login_date, pwd_update_date, create_time, update_time from sys_user where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select user_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, avatar, phonenumber, email, sex, birthday, invite_code, level_detail, user_level, level, pay_password, security_question_set, growth_value, team_leader_level, default_currency, real_name_status, status, del_flag, login_ip, login_date, pwd_update_date, create_time, update_time from sys_user where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1 for update

select user_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, avatar, phonenumber, email, sex, birthday, invite_code, level_detail, user_level, level, pay_password, security_question_set, growth_value, default_currency, real_name_status, status, del_flag, login_ip, login_date, pwd_update_date, create_time, update_time from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.birthday, u.avatar, u.password, u.pay_password, case when u.pay_password is null or u.pay_password = '' then 0 else 1 end as pay_password_set, u.security_question_set, u.total_invest_amount, u.total_recharge_amount, u.growth_value, u.team_leader_level, u.default_currency, u.real_name_status, u.invite_code, u.level_detail, u.user_level, u.level, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.pwd_update_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.update_by, u.update_time, u.remark, (select p.user_name from sys_user p where p.user_id = substring_index(u.level_detail, ',', -1) and p.user_id != 0) as parent_user_name from sys_user u where u.invite_code = #{inviteCode} and u.del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, user_name from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, phonenumber from sys_user where phonenumber = #{phonenumber} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, email from sys_user where email = #{email} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user( user_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, email, avatar, phonenumber, sex, birthday, password, invite_code, level_detail, user_level, level, team_leader_level, pay_password, real_name_status, status, pwd_update_date, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{phonenumber}, #{sex}, #{birthday}, #{password}, #{inviteCode}, #{levelDetail}, #{userLevel}, #{level}, #{teamLeaderLevel}, #{payPassword}, #{realNameStatus}, #{status}, #{pwdUpdateDate}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update sys_user set status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set growth_value = #{growthValue}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set level = #{level}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set login_ip = #{loginIp}, login_date = #{loginDate}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set pwd_update_date = sysdate(), password = #{password}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set pay_password = #{payPassword}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set security_question_set = #{securityQuestionSet}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set default_currency = #{defaultCurrency}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set real_name_status = #{realNameStatus}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}

update sys_user set total_invest_amount = greatest(0, ifnull(total_invest_amount, 0) + ifnull(#{investDelta}, 0)), total_recharge_amount = greatest(0, ifnull(total_recharge_amount, 0) + ifnull(#{rechargeDelta}, 0)), update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id = #{userId}

update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id in
#{userId}
